title.ko: 혼합, 예. 용해, 유화, 분산 (페인트의 혼합 B44D3/06)
title.en: MIXING, e.g. DISSOLVING, EMULSIFYING OR DISPERSING  (mixing paints B44D0003060000)

definition.ko: 용해 B01F21/00 혼합, 분산, 유화 공정 B01F23/00 장치 플로우 믹서(FLOW MIXERS) B01F25/00 회전운동이 있는 B01F27/00, B01F29/00 기타 혼합기 B01F31/00, B01F33/00 부속장치 B01F35/00

title.ko: 용해 (용해에 의한 분리 B01D; 냉각에 효과를 주기 위한 용해 F25D5/00)
title.en: Dissolving (separating by dissolving B01D;dissolving to effect cooling F25D0005000000)
using driven stirrers
using flow mixing

title.ko: 혼합될 상에 따른 혼합, 예. 분산 또는 유화
title.en: Mixing according to the phases to be mixed, e.g. dispersing or emulsifying

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서 다음의 용어는 지시된 의미로 사용된다 : ㆍ"기체"는 증기를 또한 포함한다.

title.en: Mixing gases with gases

title.ko: 기체와 액체의 혼합
title.en: Mixing gases with liquids
by introducing liquids into gaseous media
by spraying or atomising of the liquids

title.ko: 액체 매체로 기체의 도입에 의한, 예. 공기 첨가 액체 생산을 위한 것
title.en: by introducing gases into liquid media, e.g. for producing aerated liquids

title.ko: 발포에 의한 (기체 또는 액체 교반을 갖는 혼합기, 예. 공기 공급관을 갖는 것 B01F33/40)
title.en: by bubbling (mixers with gas or liquid agitation, e.g. with air supply tubes B01F0033400000)
using flow-mixing means for introducing the gases, e.g. baffles
adding the flowing main component by suction means, e.g. using an ejector
using driven stirrers with completely immersed stirring elements
Surface aerating
for making foam
specially adapted for aerating or carbonating beverages
within small containers, e.g. within bottles
characterised by the physical or chemical properties of gases or vapours introduced in the liquid media
for obtaining fine bubbles, i.e. bubbles with a size below 100 µm
for obtaining bubbles with a size below 1 µm
Mixing gases with solids
Mixing liquids with liquids; Emulsifying
Emulsifying
using electrical or magnetic fields, heat or vibrations
using driven stirrers
using flow mixing
by injecting one liquid into another
by injecting a mixture of liquid and gas
involving high-viscosity liquids, e.g. asphalt

title.ko: 액체와 고체의 혼합 (액체내 분산된 고형분 분산액에서 액체를 다른 액체로 변위 B01D12/00)
title.en: Mixing liquids with solids (displacing one liquid by another in dispersions of solids in liquids B01D0012000000)
using driven stirrers
Mixing high-viscosity liquids with solids
Mixing solids with solids
using a receptacle with a bottom discharge with oscillating or vibrating opening and closing elements; using a receptacle with a bottom discharge with elements fitted on moving chains
using rotatable mixing elements at the lower end of discharge hoppers
Pre-treatment of the materials to be mixed
After-treatment of the mixture

title.ko: 흐름 혼합기; 낙하 물질의 혼합기, 예. 고형 입자 (원심혼합기 B04)
title.en: Mixers

title.ko: 흐름 혼합기; 낙하 물질의 혼합기, 예. 고형 입자 (원심혼합기 B04)
title.en: Flow mixers; Mixers for falling materials, e.g. solid particles (centrifugal mixers B04)
Mixing by creating a vortex flow, e.g. by tangential introduction of flow components

title.ko: 제트 믹서, 즉. 고속 유체 흐름을 사용하는 믹서 (소용돌이 흐름을 생성하기 위해 제트를 사용하는 것 B01F25/10)
title.en: Jet mixers, i.e. mixers using high-speed fluid streams (using jets to create vortex flow B01F0025100000)
with submerged injectors, e.g. nozzles, for injecting high-pressure jets into a large volume or into mixing chambers
Mixing by intersecting jets
Mixing by jets impinging against collision plates
Mixing by jetting components into a conduit for agitating its contents

title.ko: 인젝터 혼합기 (소용돌이 흐름의 생성에 의한 혼합 B01F25/10)
title.en: Injector mixers (mixing by creating vortex flow B01F0025100000)

title.ko: 주 구성성분이 흐르는 곳을 통한 도관 또는 튜브 안에서
title.en: in conduits or tubes through which the main component flows
with Venturi elements; Details thereof
wherein additional components are introduced in the centre of the conduit
wherein additional components are introduced at the circumference of the conduit

title.ko: 도관의 다른 지점에서의 압력의 차이가 추가적인 구성성분의 주 구성성분으로의 도입을 유발하는 것 (B01F25/316이 우선)
title.en: wherein a difference of pressure at different points of the conduit causes introduction of the additional component into the main component (B01F0025316000 takes precedence)
with containers for additional components fixed to the conduit
wherein the additional components are added in a by-pass of the main flow

title.ko: 정적 혼합기 (콜로이드 밀 B02C; 혼합기 밸브 F16K11/00)
title.en: Static mixers (colloid-mills B02C;mixing valves F16K0011000000)
Mixers of the fractal type

title.ko: 혼합이 변화하는 방향으로 구성 요소를 함께 이동하는 것에 의해 영향을 받는 것, 예. 배플 또는 장애물이 있는 튜브에서
title.en: in which the mixing is affected by moving the components jointly in changing directions, e.g. in tubes provided with baffles or obstructions

title.ko: 복잡하거나 미로 같은 경로에서 구성요소를 이동하는 것에 의한 것 (B01F25/433이 우선)
title.en: by moving the components in a convoluted or labyrinthine path (B01F0025433000 takes precedence)
between stacked plates, e.g. grooved or perforated plates
Mixing tubes, e.g. wherein the material is moved in a radial or partly reversed direction
Straight mixing tubes with baffles or obstructions that do not cause substantial pressure drop; Baffles therefor
with helical baffles

with means for dividing the material flow into separate sub-flows and for repositioning and recombining these sub-flows; Cross-mixing, e.g. conducting the outer layer of the material nearer to the axis of the tube or vice-versa
Mixing tubes wherein the shape of the tube influences the mixing, e.g. mixing tubes with varying cross-section or provided with inwardly extending profiles
Mixing tubes comprising cylindrical or conical inserts provided with grooves or protrusions
Mixing tubes composed of concentric tubular members
Mixers in which the components are pressed through slits
characterised by the configuration of the surfaces forming the slits
characterised by the relative position of the surfaces during operation

title.ko: 혼합되는 재료가 오리피스 또는 틈새 공간을 통해 서로 가압되는 혼합기 (B01F25/44가 우선)
title.en: Mixers in which the materials to be mixed are pressed together through orifices or interstitial spaces, e.g. between beads (B01F0025440000 takes precedence)
characterised by means for moving the materials to be mixed or the mixture
characterised by elements provided with orifices or interstitial spaces
Homogenising or emulsifying nozzles
Circulation mixers, e.g. wherein at least part of the mixture is discharged from and reintroduced into a receptacle
in which the mixture is circulated through a set of tubes, e.g. with gradual introduction of a component into the circulating flow
with a rotary stirrer in the recirculation tube
in which the mixture is discharged from and reintroduced into a receptacle through a recirculation tube, into which an additional component is introduced
provided with a pump inside the receptacle to recirculate the material within the receptacle
Pump mixers, i.e. mixing within a pump
of the gear type
of the centrifugal-pump type, i.e. turbo-mixers
Spray-mixers, e.g. for mixing intersecting sheets of material
with nozzles
for spraying a fluid on falling particles or on a liquid curtain
with rotating parts, e.g. discs
Falling particle mixers, e.g. with repeated agitation along a vertical axis
uniting flows of material taken from different parts of a receptacle or from a set of different receptacles
with receptacles provided with fixed guiding elements therein, e.g. baffles; Cross-mixers comprising crossing channels for guiding the falling particles
wherein the particles fall onto a film that flows along the inner wall of a mixer
with moving or vibrating means, e.g. stirrers, for enhancing the mixing

title.ko: 고정된 용기 내에 회전하는 교반장치가 있는 혼합기 (자기 혼합기 B01F33/45) ; 반죽기
title.en: Mixers with rotary stirring devices in fixed receptacles (magnetic mixers B01F0033450000); Kneaders

characterised by their materials

characterised by the configuration of the stirrers

with arms, paddles, vanes or blades
pin-shaped
anchor-shaped

rake-shaped or grid-shaped

ribbon shaped with an open space between the helical ribbon flight and the rotating axis

with holes on the surface
with separate elements other than discs fixed on the discs, e.g. vanes fixed on the discs
Stirrers shaped as cylinders, balls or rollers
Stirrers provided with conical-shaped elements, e.g. funnel-shaped
Stirrers in the form of brushes, sieves, grids, chains or springs

Stirrers with tubes for guiding the material
Stirrers with additional elements mounted on the stirrer, for purposes other than mixing
for disintegrating, e.g. for milling
for cutting, e.g. with knives
Stirrers with two or more mixing elements mounted in sequence on the same axis
with similar elements
with dissimilar elements

characterised by the material of the shaft

composed of interconnected parts

Shafts with adjustable length, e.g. telescopic shafts

with two or more rotation axes
with parallel axes
with perpendicular axes

with means for moving the materials to be mixed radially between the surfaces of the rotor and the stator
with means for moving the materials to be mixed axially between the surfaces of the rotor and the stator, e.g. the stator rotor system formed by conical or cylindrical surfaces

with rotating surfaces next to each other, i.e. on substantially parallel axes
Pipe mixers, i.e. mixers wherein the materials to be mixed flow continuously through pipes, e.g. column mixers
with stirrers driven by the moving material

about an inclined axis

with buckets

title.ko: 실질적으로 수직 축을 중심으로 회전하는 교반기로

with a mixing receptacle rotating alternately in opposite directions

with supporting means moving in a horizontal plane, e.g. describing an orbital path for moving the containers about an axis which intersects the receptacle axis at an angle
by pivoting the containers about an axis
the containers being submitted to a rectilinear movement

title.ko: 수평면이 아닌 다른 움직임의 조합으로 컨테이너를 제출하는 경우, 예. 직선 및 회전운동(움직임의 조합이 제출된 리젭터클과 함께하는 것, 즉. 진동 또는 진동하는 하나 이상의 움직임 B01F31/50)

using receptacles with deformable parts, e.g. membranes, to which a motion is imparted

with pendulum stirrers, i.e. with stirrers suspended so as to oscillate about fixed points or axes

title.ko: 흔들림(shaking), 진동(oscillating), 또는 진동(vibrating) 운동을 수행하는 교반기 포함(B01F31/40, B01F31/42가 우선)

with vibration of the receptacle or part of it
transmitting the vibratory energy by means of a fluid, e.g. by means of air shock waves

by controlling the ratio of two or more flows, e.g. using flow sensing or flow controlling devices
by feeding the materials batchwise

using gas or liquid injected into the material, e.g. using liquefied carbon dioxide or steam
for heating the outside of the receptacle, e.g. heated jackets or burners
arranged inside the receptacle
using radiation, e.g. microwaves or electromagnetic radiation
using heated or cooled stirrers
